name: TensorOrbit-JARVIS-v2 raw acquisition and full-O(3) target-cache build v2
purpose: Build a new source-verified, formula-disjoint, full-O(3)-compatible TensorOrbit-JARVIS-v2 artifact without overwriting the legacy proper-SO(3) build or the interrupted four-file full-O(3) directory.

source_provenance.note: The prior manifest incorrectly named divelab/AIRS as source_url. The pinned commit resolves to YKQ98/GMTNet; a fresh download from that exact commit matches the previously recorded source_pickle_sha256 and regenerates byte-identical normalized records.

raw_record_contract.tensor: finite 3x6 piezoelectric matrix in C/m^2; source order and engineering shear stored per row
raw_record_contract.target: Cartesian polar rank-three tensor symmetric in its strain indices and Reynolds-projected over the complete O(3) crystallographic point group
raw_record_contract.tensor_orbit: GaugeFlow condition orbits remain proper SO(3); improper operations are crystal-compatibility constraints only
raw_record_contract.cell_convention: row lattice r=f@L; GL(3,Z) cell changes do not rotate the Cartesian tensor

activation_inputs.zero_tensors: retain and count exact physical zero tensors
activation_inputs.joins: unique material_id joins across raw source, split, CSV and target caches

promotion_rule: This build must pass complete joins, formula leakage, StructureMatcher, tensor invariance, zero-target, response-stratum and hash audits before it can be proposed for oracle qualification.
